$comment: The 0G 0Gora — the example instance that ships with the framework. This file is the SINGLE declarative source of truth for everything that makes this instance about 0G: its branding, its example questions, its seed corpus, and its system prompts. It contains NO secrets — the wallet key and runtime toggles live in .env (gitignored). To found your own 0Gora: copy this folder, edit this file, point .env at your funded 0G wallet, and deploy. The framework in ../../src reads this at runtime (mounted at /example/0gora.config.json); none of it is baked into the code.
name: 0Gora
instanceLabel: the 0G agora · an example built on 0Gora

hero.title: ØGora
hero.sub: A marketplace of knowledge on 0G. Every answer is generated and cryptographically verified inside a 0G TEE — so you can trust where it came from.

corpus.$comment: Seed sources for this instance's knowledge base, ingested via POST /contribute (see seed.sh). The live corpus is 0G's docs + blog.

prompts.$comment: Optional system-prompt overrides. null = use the framework default, which is templated from `name` + `ecosystem` above.
